nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club and principal support club of the Hells Angels, involved in violent crimes and drug trafficking.
Major outlaw motorcycle club; the Red Devils MC is their support club, performing violent tasks and protecting their interests.
Now-defunct Canadian motorcycle club founded in the late 1940s; patched over to Bacchus in 2015.
East Coast based motorcycle club that absorbed the Original Red Devils MC in 2015.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club; involved in a dispute with Hells Angels that led to a shooting attack on a Red Devils member.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club; a Red Devils member assaulted an Outlaws member in 2020.
Motorcycle club involved in a gun battle with Red Devils and Hells Angels in 2022.
Motorcycle club involved in a gun battle with Red Devils and Hells Angels in 2022.

edges.context: The Red Devils MC is the principal support club of the Hells Angels, acting as their shock troops and protecting their interests.
The Original Red Devils MC patched over to Bacchus in 2015.
A shooting attack on a Red Devils member in 2013 was speculated to be due to an ongoing dispute between Hells Angels and Bandidos.
A Red Devils member assaulted an Outlaws member in 2020, indicating rivalry.
Red Devils and Hells Angels were involved in a gun battle with Infamous Ryders in 2022.
Red Devils and Hells Angels were involved in a gun battle with La Familia in 2022.
Ongoing dispute between Hells Angels and Bandidos, as speculated in the 2013 shooting attack on a Red Devils member.
